mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN ( SELECT session_id, COUNT(1) AS message_count, MAX(create_time) AS last_message_time, SUM(CASE WHEN message_role = 'assistant' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assistant_message_count, SUM(CASE WHEN message_role = 'assistant' AND cited_chunk_ids IS NOT NULL AND cited_chunk_ids <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cited_message_count FROM ai_agent_message GROUP BY session_id ) msg ON msg.session_id = s.id
FROM ai_agent_session s LEFT JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN ai_skill sk ON sk.id = s.skill_id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = s.base_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_agent_session (user_id, skill_id, skill_version_id, provider_config_id, model_code, base_id, session_title, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{skillId}, #{skillVersionId}, #{providerConfigId}, #{modelCode}, #{baseId}, #{sessionTitle}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_agent_session SET session_title = #{sessionTitle} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_agent_session SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.user_id, usr.username, usr.real_name, s.skill_id, s.skill_version_id, s.base_id, sk.skill_name, kb.base_name, s.model_code, s.session_title, s.status, COALESCE(msg.message_count, 0) AS message_count, msg.last_message_time, s.create_time
ORDER BY COALESCE(msg.last_message_time, s.create_time) DESC, s.id DESC

SELECT COALESCE(sk.skill_name, 'unknown skill') AS label, COUNT(1) AS session_count, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) AS message_count FROM ai_agent_session s LEFT JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN ai_skill sk ON sk.id = s.skill_id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = s.base_id
GROUP BY sk.skill_name ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT COALESCE(usr.real_name, usr.username, 'unknown user') AS label, COUNT(1) AS session_count, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) AS message_count FROM ai_agent_session s LEFT JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN ai_skill sk ON sk.id = s.skill_id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = s.base_id
GROUP BY usr.real_name, usr.username ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(1) AS total_session_count, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(msg.message_count, 0)), 0) AS total_message_count, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(msg.assistant_message_count, 0)), 0) AS assistant_message_count, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(msg.cited_message_count, 0)), 0) AS cited_message_count FROM ai_agent_session s LEFT JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN ai_skill sk ON sk.id = s.skill_id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = s.base_id

SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', s.create_time), 'YYYY-MM') AS label, COUNT(1) AS value FROM ai_agent_session s LEFT JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN ai_skill sk ON sk.id = s.skill_id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = s.base_id
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', s.create_time) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', s.create_time) ASC

SELECT COALESCE(sk.skill_name, 'unknown skill') AS label, COUNT(1) AS session_count, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) AS message_count FROM ai_agent_session s LEFT JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN ai_skill sk ON sk.id = s.skill_id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = s.base_id
GROUP BY sk.skill_name ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT COALESCE(kb.base_name, 'unknown knowledge base') AS label, COUNT(1) AS session_count, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) AS message_count FROM ai_agent_session s LEFT JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN ai_skill sk ON sk.id = s.skill_id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = s.base_id
GROUP BY kb.base_name ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT COALESCE(usr.real_name, usr.username, 'unknown user') AS label, COUNT(1) AS session_count, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) AS message_count FROM ai_agent_session s LEFT JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN ai_skill sk ON sk.id = s.skill_id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = s.base_id
GROUP BY usr.real_name, usr.username ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(usr.real_name, usr.username, 'unknown user'), ' / ', COALESCE(sk.skill_name, 'unknown skill')) AS label, own.expert_level, COUNT(1) AS session_count, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) AS message_count, COALESCE(SUM(msg.assistant_message_count), 0) AS assistant_message_count, COALESCE(SUM(msg.cited_message_count), 0) AS cited_message_count, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(msg.assistant_message_count), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(msg.cited_message_count), 0) * 100.0 / SUM(msg.assistant_message_count), 2) END AS citation_hit_rate FROM ai_agent_session s INNER JOIN ai_skill_owner own ON own.user_id = s.user_id AND own.skill_id = s.skill_id AND own.status = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN ai_skill sk ON sk.id = s.skill_id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = s.base_id
GROUP BY usr.real_name, usr.username, sk.skill_name, own.expert_level ORDER BY citation_hit_rate DESC, COUNT(1) DESC, COALESCE(SUM(msg.message_count), 0) DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT s.id, s.user_id, usr.username, usr.real_name, s.skill_id, s.skill_version_id, s.base_id, sk.skill_name, kb.base_name, s.model_code, s.session_title, s.status, COALESCE(msg.message_count, 0) AS message_count, msg.last_message_time, s.create_time
WHERE s.id = #{id}
